title: Senyum Pagi di Balik Meja Kopi
theme: Menemukan kehangatan dan koneksi dalam rutinitas sehari-hari serta pentingnya perhatian kecil.

cover.prompt: A warm, inviting cafe interior during the early morning hours. Focus on a gleaming espresso machine on a deep-toned wooden bar. Gentle steam rises from coffee cups, catching the soft, golden light filtering through large windows. Blurry, undefined silhouettes of customers, holding various coffee beverages, create a sense of bustling yet comforting routine. Emphasis on the rich textures of the coffee preparation area and the peaceful atmosphere of a popular neighborhood spot.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: Ayu, a barista, notices a loyal customer, Pak Budi, is absent. Driven by concern, she delivers his usual coffee to his home, discovering he's unwell and lonely, leading to a warm, unexpected connection.
